name: lavanderia-sastreria-desktop
author: Sistetecni
description: Aplicación de escritorio para gestión de lavandería y sastrería

scripts.dist:local: npm run build && node node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --win nsis --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && node node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --win nsis --publish always
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && node node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && node node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --linux AppImage deb --publish never
scripts.dev:app: node node_modules/wait-on/bin/wait-on http-get://localhost:5173 dist-electron/main/main.js && node node_modules/electron/cli.js .
scripts.dev: node node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:electron" "npm run dev:app"
scripts.dev:debug: ELECTRON_OPEN_DEVTOOLS=1 node node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:electron" "npm run dev:app"
scripts.build: node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && node scripts/copy-migrations.js
scripts.typecheck: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.electron.json
